popularStory.headline: COFFIN FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
COFFIN FAMILY
(Source: “My Father’s Shoes: Our Coffin Story,” by Ross Coffin.)
November 18, 2019
March 3, 2016
(The Coffin Family goes back before 1400. Not listed here.)


1. Sir William Coffin 1400- …

sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: William Coffin - Individual or family possessions: birth-name: William Coffin

William Coffin of Alwington: died 11 Sep 1486; son of John Coffin of Alwinginton & Thomasin Hathey; married to Margaret, daughter of Thomas Giffard of Halsbury & Wilmot Knight; father of Richard Coffin, John Coffin of Northam & Costantia

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Coffyn於大約1423年出生在英國英格蘭戴文波特萊其時，他的父親John Coffin32歲，母親Thomasin Hathey28歲。他於1453年與Margaret Giffard在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年9月11日在英國英格蘭戴文阿爾文頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Coffyn于大约1423年出生在英国英格兰戴文波特萊其时，他的父亲John Coffin32岁，母亲Thomasin Hathey28岁。他于1453年与Margaret Giffard在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年9月11日在英国英格兰戴文阿爾文頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coffyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern England, of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Middle English cofin, coffin, Old French cof(f)in (from Late Latin cophinus, Greek kophinos) ‘container, basket; coffer, chest (for keeping treasures, documents, armour, etc.)’. Early bearers of this as a hereditary surname were of knightly rank. Old French cofin was synonymous with coffer, and it may be that Cofin was used to denote a keeper of the (royal) coffer, attested in Anglo-Latin cofferarius. Compare Coffer . The modern English word coffin is a specialized development of this term, not attested until the 16th century.
History: Tristram Coffin came from Brixham, Devon, to Haverhill, MA, before 1647. An important line of his descendants is associated with Nantucket and Martha's Vineyard.

variants.name: Coffer
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English cofre, coffre, coffer ‘box, chest’ (from Old French cof(f)rehere), used to denote a box or coffer maker (Old French coffrier), perhaps also for a treasurer.
Probably also an Americanized form of German Kaufer or Kauffer.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Coffyn was born about 1423, in Portledge, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Coffin, was 32 and his mother, Thomasin Hathey, was 28. He married Margaret Giffard in 1453, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 11 September 1486, in Alwington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Coffyn est né environ 1423, à Portledge, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Coffin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Thomasin Hathey, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Giffard en 1453, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 septembre 1486, à Alwington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Coffyn um 1423 in Portledge, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Coffin 32 und seine Mutter Thomasin Hathey 28. Er hat 1453 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. September 1486 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Alwington, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Coffyn è nato il circa 1423 nel Portledge, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Coffin, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Thomasin Hathey, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Giffard nel 1453, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 settembre 1486, nel Alwington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Coffynが約1423年にイギリスイギリスデボンポルトレッジで生まれた時，父John Coffinは32歳，母Thomasin Hatheyは28歳であった。1453年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMargaret Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年9月11日にイギリスイギリスデボンアルウィントンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Coffyn(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 포틀레지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Coffin(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasin Hathey(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Margaret Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 9월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 알윙턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Coffyn nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Portledge, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Coffin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Thomasin Hathey, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Giffard em 1453, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1486, em Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Coffyn родился около 1423 г. в местности портледж, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Coffin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasin Hathey, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Giffard в 1453 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 сентября 1486 г. в местности алвингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Coffyn nació aproximadamente 1423, en Portledge, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Coffin, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Thomasin Hathey, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Giffard en 1453, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1486, en Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
